positive: An intricate geometric mandala pattern inspired by Art Deco symmetry, featuring stylized native flora (like hibiscus and ferns) and abstract celestial bodies (moons and stars). The design should be highly detailed, utilizing a limited, vibrant color palette of deep teal, burnt orange, and gold leaf accents. The composition must be centered and scalable, designed to look exceptional when printed on fabric. Use clean, sharp lines and a strong contrast between the intricate details and the surrounding negative space. Minimalist, symmetrical, luxury aesthetic, high contrast, flat lay presentation.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, low detail, noise, smudge, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, messy, photorealism, 3d render, bokeh
